packageRules.description: Two Cargo.lock files: the workspace root and the excluded fuzz sub-workspace. Renovate resolves each against its own lockfile; label them so PRs name which tree moved.
Group patch and minor Cargo updates into one PR: low-risk, reviewed together.
Keep major Cargo updates on their own PRs: each carries a breaking change to weigh separately.
Pin GitHub Actions to a commit digest, and group their updates.
